title: Ratmageddon
description: Dive headfirst into RATMAGEDDON (Work in Progress), a surreal, high-energy comedy adventure from RatBag. Fresh from Soho Theatre’s Comedy Lab, this work-in-progress blends sketch, clown, and character comedy to create a feral, apocalyptic world where the audience becomes gloriously complicit in the chaos. Expect big characters, bold choices, rapid transformations, and joyful theatrical mayhem as two performers push each other right to the edge. With musical madness, playful rule-breaking, and unpredictable twists, RATMAGEDDON (Work in Progress) invites you not just to watch but to join the disorder. Unashamedly silly, wildly imaginative, and dangerously fun, this is cult comedy in the making.
